title: 10+ Modpack
description: 10+ is a modpack created by jordensmiley where the modpack has 10 of everything.
body:
# Description
10+ Modpack is a Minecraft modpack that will revamp Minecraft's animations, performance and more. However, this modpack is unique, featuring 10 mods, texture packs, and datapacks. As ya may know, I, jordensmiley, owns 10+ Studios and Smiley Team! So of course the modpack will use Fabric but it will support 1.21.4-1.21.6 (currently, 1.21.4 and 1.21.5 is in da works!)! 
This modpack includes texture packs like Fresh Animations, Better Animations, and (Bee's) Fancy Crops.
(the modpack supports both client-side and server-side)




# Disclaimer
There will be a lot of errors. So uhh don't ask me for help go ask other people for help lmao.
